context: A pivotal moment in this round of 16 match. England lead Senegal 3-0. The game hangs in the balance — every decision from the touchline could decide the outcome.

options.label: A
options.action: Defensive substitution — bring on a fresh center-back, sit deep

options.label: B
options.action: Drop deeper as a unit, protect the lead, counter-attack

options.label: C
options.action: Keep attacking — the best defense is a good offense

options.label: D
options.action: Bring on a defensive midfielder, switch to 5-4-1

real_decision.description: England won 3-0. Jordan Brian Henderson (38'), Harry Kane (47'), Bukayo Saka (56').

pre_generated_explanations.A:
**OPTION A — Defensive substitution — bring on a fresh center-back, sit deep**
Risk level: Medium. This is the safe, professional choice that protects the lead without abandoning attacking threat. pre_generated_explanations.B:

Risk level: Low. This is a solid conservative choice that prioritizes defensive stability. Low risk of conceding, but may invite pressure. pre_generated_explanations.C:
**OPTION C — Keep attacking — the best defense is a good offense**
Risk level: High. This is the aggressive choice. Keeping attacking intent when leading can catch opponents off guard but leaves defensive gaps. pre_generated_explanations.D:
**OPTION D — Bring on a defensive midfielder, switch to 5-4-1**
Risk level: Low. This is the ultra-defensive option. Maximum security at the back, but surrenders possession and invites sustained pressure. replay_events.description: Jordan Brian Henderson scores for England!
Pape Gueye replaces Pathé Ismaël Ciss (Tactical)
Pape Matar Sarr replaces Krépin Diatta (Tactical)
Cheikh Ahmadou Bamba Mbacke Dieng replaces Iliman Ndiaye (Tactical)
